name: Hearty Summer Salad Bowl
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 oz.) frozen green beans, cooked and cooled
1 cup diced cooked ham or chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the kidney beans.
2. Mix all ingredients except garnishes in a large bowl.
3. Let set at least four hours before serving.
4. Arrange prettily in a large glass bowl.
5. Garnish with hard-cooked egg slices and cherry tomatoes.
Serves 6-8.
